description_long: This is a round, white ceramic plate featuring a serving of food, including slices of roasted meat, a portion of white rice, a green vegetable side, and a mixed salad. The plate is smooth and glossy, with a slightly raised rim to help contain the food. The food items are arranged in distinct sections, with the meat and rice occupying the largest portions of the plate, while the vegetables and salad are placed on the sides. The plate appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible chips or cracks. The overall presentation suggests it is intended for a single meal serving, typical of a home or restaurant setting.
description: A white ceramic plate with roasted meat, rice, green vegetables, and salad, arranged in separate sections. The plate is glossy, clean, and suitable for a single meal serving.
description_view_0: This view shows the plate with the roasted meat and rice most prominently visible, with green vegetables and salad on the sides.
description_view_1: Here, the darker side of the meat is more visible, with the rice and green vegetables partially obscured.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the green vegetables and salad, with the meat slices and rice less prominent.
description_view_3: The plate is shown with the rice and green vegetables in the foreground, and the meat slices towards the back.
